use_cases: Displaying adaptive card layouts that adjust content arrangement based on step progression
Creating product or service showcases with varying information density
Building progressive disclosure content patterns with smooth y-axis transitions
Implementing responsive card containers with configurable widths (400px, 550px, 700px)
ai_summary: An adaptive card component with three distinct layout configurations that dynamically adjust container dimensions, image heights, content direction, and alignment based on step state. Uses Framer Motion for smooth y-axis slide animations (120px) and supports flexible content arrangement with row/column layouts. Ideal for progressive content display in SaaS applications and product showcases.
